title: ANC - 10.-ANC is OFF without selected values and the User does not toggle it ON during a call when Transparency is ON before a call
scenario: ANC remains off and Transparency Mode returns to its previous ON state after a call when ANC was off with no value selected and Transparency was on before the call.
steps: 1. Ensure ANC is OFF with no value selected.
2. Turn ON Transparency Mode with a selected value.
4. During the call, observe ANC state and do not toggle it ON.
6. Observe ANC and Transparency Mode states after the call.
expected: During the call, ANC remains OFF without selected values. After the call, ANC stays OFF and Transparency returns to its previous ON state with the previously selected value.
